name: Telegram
description: Messaging platform via Bot API. Send messages, photos, documents, manage chats, pin messages, and configure webhooks with AI agent integration.

capabilities.name: Send Telegram Message
capabilities.description: Send a text message to a chat

capabilities.name: Forward Telegram Message
capabilities.description: Forward a message to another chat

capabilities.name: Get Telegram Chat Member
capabilities.description: Get info about a chat member

capabilities.name: Pin Telegram Message
capabilities.description: Pin a message in a chat

capabilities.name: Set Telegram Webhook
capabilities.description: Configure webhook URL for bot updates
